spec_match.rationale: The page now runs a real DOM probe that opens popover=hint and popover=auto and checks that both remain :popover-open, matching the Chrome 150 coexistence contract.

interactive.rationale: Neat interactions combining hover listeners, mouseenter/mouseleave hooks, and custom toggle log indicators.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned beautifully with the parent index listing blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: The support state now distinguishes basic Popover API support, hint value reflection, and actual hint/auto coexistence behavior.

references.rationale: The see also block links other local concepts but completely misses the ChromeStatus entry link.

design_system.rationale: Fits seamlessly: matching dark toolbar styling, compact layouts, and light border frames.

openQuestions.title: Re-review repaired live probe in chrome-devtools-mcp
openQuestions.detail: The live probe or copyable feature-detection snippet was repaired on 2026-06-04. Re-run this route in chrome-devtools-mcp, exercise the visible controls, and verify the repaired probe output plus console/network state before marking the critique fully current.

openQuestions.title: Link ChromeStatus in see also references
openQuestions.detail: Add the canonical ChromeStatus link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6282804208992256 to the see also block at the bottom of the index.html file.

summary: 2026-06-04 maintenance replaced inaccurate live-probe logic with feature-specific checks; chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable in this session, so browser click-through re-review is still required.
